texto: I want to tell him I love him
autor: I try to say the words I feel in my gut and my heart and every inch of me. But nothing comes out.
explicacao: Citação de I try to say the words I feel in my gut and my heart and every inch of me. But nothing comes out. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I want to tell him I love him” articula amor, nikki-rae, sunshine em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como sunshine.
